name: Canvas LMS
description: Manage your Canvas coursework with quick access to courses, assignments, and grades. Track upcomin
longDescription: Comprehensive Canvas LMS MCP server with 90+ tools for students and educators. Manage courses, assignments, submissions, grading, discussions, announcements, analytics, and more. Includes agent skills for common workflows.
author: ai.smithery
examplePrompts: Show me upcoming assignment due dates
Grade this submission with the rubric
Send a message to all students in my course
